sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: SCHWAB CHARLES CORP의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 순매출이 65억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 16% 성장하며 기록을 경신했습니다.
GAAP 주당순이익은 1.37달러, 조정 주당순이익은 1.43달러로 전년 동기 대비 38% 상승했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 운용형 투자(Managed Investing) 순유입이 전년 대비 46% 늘며 자산관리·뱅킹 솔루션이 기록적 수준에 도달했습니다.
청소년 대상 슈왑 틴 인베스터(Schwab Teen Investor) 계좌를 새로 출시하며 투자 경험 영역을 확장했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 총 고객 자산이 전년 대비 19% 증가한 11조 7,700억 달러로 기록을 세웠습니다.
3월 핵심 순신규자산이 797억 달러로 월간 기준 역대 두 번째 규모를 기록했습니다.
1분기 중 자사주 2,430만 주를 24억 달러에 매입하고 보통주 배당을 19% 인상했습니다.

watchItems.text: 은행 대출이 609억 달러로 29% 늘고 마진 대출도 1,267억 달러로 확대되는 등 대출 성장세가 향후 순이자수익의 핵심 변수입니다.
기록적인 일평균 거래량 990만 건이 향후 거래 수수료 수익에 어떻게 반영될지 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a1q26exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 CLIENT GROWTH & ENGAGEMENT DRIVE RECORD SCHWAB 1Q RESULTS March Core Net New Assets Equal $79.7 Billion, Second Highest Month Ever Robust Engagement Drove 1Q Net Revenues to a Record $6.5 Billion, Up 16% Year-Over-Year Record GAAP Earnings Per Share of $1.37; $1.43 Adjusted (1) – up 38% versus 1Q25 WESTLAKE, Texas, April 16, 2026 – The Charles Schwab Corporation reported net income for the first quarter totaling $2.5 billion, or earnings per share of $1.37. Excluding $143 million of pre-tax transaction-related costs, adjusted (1) net income and earnings per share equaled $2.6 billion and $1.43, respectively. Client Driven Growt  Normalized numeric aliases: $79.7 Billion = 797억 달러; $6.5 Billion = 65억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $143 million = 1억 4,300만 달러; $2.6 billion = 26억 달러; 1.3 million = 130만 달러; $140 billion = 1,400억 달러; $79.7 = 79.7달러; $1.37 = 1.37달러; $140 = 140달러; $1.43 = 1.43달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $143 = 143달러; $2.6 = 2.6달러.

ring the first quarter. Excluding a planned mutual fund clearing deconversion, asset gathering totaled $158 billion – an annualized growth rate of 5.4%.” President & CEO Rick Wurster Deepen Client Relationships 46% 1Q26 Managed Investing Net Flows Growth “Clients continue to turn to us for more of their financial lives, helping wealth and banking solutions reach record levels in 1Q. Led by Schwab Wealth Advisory TM , Managed Investing net flows grew 46% year-over-year while bank loans expanded 29% versus 1Q25 to $60.9 billion.” President & CEO Rick Wurster Diversified Revenue Growth 16% 1Q26 Revenue Growth vs. 1Q25 “Schwab’s diversified model delivered record results within an increasingly uncertain macroeconomic environment. Driven by robust client engagement across our wealth, trading, and lending solutions, total first quarter revenue inc  Normalized numeric aliases: $158 billion = 1,580억 달러; $60.9 billion = 609억 달러; $6.5 billion = 65억 달러; $158 = 158달러; $60.9 = 60.9달러; $6.5 = 6.5달러.

Mike Verdeschi Opportunistic Capital Return $2.4B 1Q26 Common Stock Repurchases “During 1Q26, the company repurchased 24.3 million shares for $2.4 billion and increased its common stock dividend by 19%. These actions reflect Schwab’s strong capital position as well as the sustained performance of the firm’s through-the-cycle financial model.” CFO Mike Verdeschi 1Q26 Client and Business Highlights • Total client assets increased 19% year-over-year to $11.77 trillion • Core net new assets totaled $140.0 billion, including a $17.5 billion outflow from a planned mutual fund clearing client deconversion; excluding this planned item, core net new   Normalized numeric aliases: 24.3 million = 2,430만 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $11.77 trillion = 11조 7,700억 달러; $140.0 billion = 1,400억 달러; $17.5 billion = 175억 달러; $157.5 billion = 1,575억 달러; 1.3 million = 130만 달러; 39.1 million = 3,910만 달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; 47.2 million = 4,720만 달러; $11.77 = 11.77달러; $140.0 = 140.0달러; $17.5 = 17.5달러; $157.5 = 157.5달러.

w 46% versus 1Q25 • Bank loan balances equaled $60.9 billion at March month-end, up 29% year-over-year • Margin loan balances increased 13% versus year-end 2025 to end the quarter at $126.7 billion – including $21.3 billion related to long/short strategies implemented by RIA clients (2) • Daily average trading volume reached a record 9.9 million – up 34% versus 1Q25 • Launched the Schwab Teen Investor TM Account, a unique and hands-on investing experience for young people ages 13–17 • Closed Forge Global acquisition in early March • Schwab ranked #1 Overall Broker by StockBrokers  Normalized numeric aliases: $60.9 billion = 609억 달러; $126.7 billion = 1,267억 달러; $21.3 billion = 213억 달러; 9.9 million = 990만 달러; $60.9 = 60.9달러; $126.7 = 126.7달러; $21.3 = 21.3달러; $6,482 = 6,482달러; $2,479 = 2,479달러; $1.43 = 1.43달러; 1,909 million = 19억 900만 달러; 6,482 million = 64억 8,200만 달러; 5,599 million = 55억 9,900만 달러; 2,479 million = 24억 7,900만 달러; 2,588 million = 25억 8,800만 달러; 2,008 million = 20억 800만 달러.
